title: Update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.48.0 - autoclosed
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://togithub.com/containers/storage) | require | minor | `v1.47.0` -> `v1.48.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage (github.com/containers/storage)</summary>

### [`v1.48.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.48.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.47.0...v1.48.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v1.47.0 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1649](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1649)
-   Fix error if continueWrite/continueRead pipe open fails by [@​dvdsk](https://togithub.com/dvdsk) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1650](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1650)
-   pkg/regexp: make sure that \&Regexp implements the interfaces by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1651](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1651)
-   Remove use of fillGo18FileTypeBits by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1652](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1652)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​dvdsk](https://togithub.com/dvdsk) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1650](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1650)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.47.0...v1.48.0

</details>
